target.label: Authority standing that may permit execution

basis.description: Power may require authority when execution is treated as permitted action inside a governance order.

when: execution is claimed as permitted within governance scope
unless: the effect operates without recognized standing or permission

effect.description: Permitted execution may depend on authority without making power identical to authority.

status.note: Authored relation packet for power requiring authority in permitted execution contexts.

subject.label: Power does not convert capacity into directive right

target.label: Authority remains recognized standing rather than mere capacity

basis.description: Effective capacity does not by itself imply permission, entitlement, or directive right.

when: power is described as effective capacity or operative leverage

effect.description: Power remains distinct from authority even when authority channels it.

status.note: Authored relation packet for the power-authority non-implication law.
